---
title: "Figure 5 bias (method comparison) — distortion-induced-bias grid: 5 algorithms x (2 params x 3 noises)"
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

<!--
Companion to figure_5_distortion_algo_grid: the FIRST-moment (bias) counterpart of the second-moment
(distortion) figure. Same layout: columns = 5 algorithms (NR, MNR, R, MR, IR); rows = 2 parameters x 3
noises, param-major (k_on {0.1,1,10} then N_ch {0.1,1,10}). Each panel = filled contour of the SIGNED
distortion-induced bias (component Likelihood_Distortion_Induced_Bias, a per-parameter VECTOR, in dex =
log10 parameter units) over the design plane (x = interval, y = N_ch). Source = battery_pool; N_ch >= 10.

SCALE (analysed): bias is SIGNED, centred on 0 (white = no bias), diverging (blue = under-estimate, red =
over-estimate). Range is huge and asymmetric: |bias| < 0.04 dex for IR/R/MR and most of MNR, but NR reaches
+3.36 dex on N_ch (2300x, coarse sampling). So the breaks are SYMMETRIC symlog about 0: dense near 0, growing
outward, reserved outer band for the NR catastrophe. Shared across all 30 panels.

Threshold: bias in dex is NOT scale-free (unlike the distortion/coverage), so a principled "negligible" line
should be standardised by the standard error (bias/SE, line at 0.5-1 SE). Here we use a PROVISIONAL absolute
line at +/-0.05 dex (~+/-12%); replace with the standardised version for the final figure.
Second output: fraction of plane with |bias| < 0.05 dex, per algorithm, vs noise.
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r params}
DATA_DIR  <- "../data/433ed13"
NSIM      <- 10000
NOISES    <- c("0.1", "1", "10")
ALGOS     <- c("macro_NR", "macro_NMR", "macro_R", "macro_MR", "macro_IR")
ALGO_LAB  <- c(macro_NR = "NR", macro_NMR = "MNR", macro_R = "R", macro_MR = "MR", macro_IR = "IR")
PARAMS    <- c(on = 0, Num_ch_mean = 5)
PARAM_LAB <- c(on = "log[10]~k[on]", Num_ch_mean = "log[10]~N[ch]")
CMP       <- "Probit_statistics_Likelihood_Distortion_Induced_Bias"

# SIGNED symlog band edges (dex), symmetric about 0; central band (-0.002, 0.002] contains 0 (white).
POS_B       <- c(0.002, 0.005, 0.01, 0.02, 0.05, 0.1, 0.2, 0.5, 1, 2)
BIAS_BREAKS <- c(-Inf, -rev(POS_B), POS_B, Inf)                  # 21 bands
PAL <- colorRampPalette(c("#021024", "#053061", "#2166AC", "#4393C3", "#92C5DE", "#D1E5F0",
                          "#F7F7F7",
                          "#FDDBC7", "#F4A582", "#D6604D", "#B2182B", "#67001F", "#3d0011")
                        )(length(BIAS_BREAKS) - 1)
# compact horizontal colourbar: label a curated symmetric subset of band boundaries (dex), blank rest
fmt_b   <- function(x) ifelse(is.infinite(x), ifelse(x > 0, "Inf", "-Inf"), formatC(x, format = "g", digits = 2))
up_edge <- BIAS_BREAKS[-1]
KEEP    <- c(-2, -0.2, -0.05, -0.005, 0.005, 0.05, 0.2, 2)
BAND_LAB_BAR <- ifelse(round(up_edge, 3) %in% round(KEEP, 3), fmt_b(up_edge), "")

BLIM <- 0.05    # provisional absolute "negligible bias" line (dex); replace with bias/SE for final
```

```{r read}
read_one <- function(algo, z) {
  files <- Sys.glob(file.path(DATA_DIR,
    sprintf("figure_3_nch_*_nsim_%d_%s_noise_%s_battery_pool.csv", NSIM, algo, z)))
  map_dfr(files, ~ read.csv(.x, skip = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)) %>% mutate(algo = algo, noise = z)
}
raw <- map_dfr(ALGOS, function(a) map_dfr(NOISES, function(z) read_one(a, z)))

dd <- raw %>%
  filter(component_path == CMP, statistic == "value", probit == "mean",
         param_index %in% PARAMS, Num_ch >= 10) %>%          # DIB is a vector: no param_col diagonal
  mutate(param_name = names(PARAMS)[match(param_index, PARAMS)]) %>%
  group_by(algo, noise, Num_ch, interval_in_tau, param_name) %>%
  summarise(D = mean(value), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(lx     = log10(interval_in_tau), ly = log10(Num_ch),
         algo_f = factor(ALGO_LAB[algo], levels = unname(ALGO_LAB[ALGOS])),
         param  = factor(param_name, levels = names(PARAMS), labels = unname(PARAM_LAB[names(PARAMS)])),
         noisef = factor(paste("noise", noise), levels = paste("noise", NOISES)))
```

```{r grid, fig.width = 7.0, fig.height = 9.0}
X_BRK <- log10(c(.01, .1, 1));           X_LAB <- c(".01", ".1", "1")
Y_BRK <- log10(c(10, 100, 1000, 10000)); Y_LAB <- c("10", "100", "1e3", "1e4")

g <- ggplot(dd, aes(lx, ly, z = D)) +
  geom_contour_filled(breaks = BIAS_BREAKS) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = PAL, drop = FALSE, labels = BAND_LAB_BAR, name = "bias (dex)",
                    guide = guide_legend(nrow = 1, byrow = TRUE, label.position = "bottom",
                                         title.position = "left", title.vjust = 0.9,
                                         keywidth = unit(0.34, "cm"), keyheight = unit(0.30, "cm"))) +
  geom_contour(breaks = c(-BLIM, BLIM), colour = "black", linewidth = .4) +
  geom_point(size = .15, colour = "grey35", alpha = .4) +
  facet_grid(param + noisef ~ algo_f, labeller = labeller(param = label_parsed)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = X_BRK, labels = X_LAB) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = Y_BRK, labels = Y_LAB) +
  labs(x = expression(Delta / tau[min]), y = expression(N[ch])) +   # title/legend in the manuscript (eLife)
  theme_bw(base_size = 9, base_family = "Helvetica") +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 8), legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
        legend.key.spacing.x = unit(0, "pt"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 7), axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 7.5))
g
ggsave("Figure_5_bias_algo_grid.pdf", g, width = 7.0, height = 9.0)
```

```{r summary, fig.width = 6.0, fig.height = 3.4}
# fraction of the plane with negligible bias (|bias| < BLIM dex), per algorithm, vs noise
ALGO_COL <- c(NR = "#000000", MNR = "#E69F00", R = "#009E73", MR = "#CC79A7", IR = "#0072B2")
sm <- dd %>% group_by(algo_f, param, noise) %>%
  summarise(fsmall = mean(abs(D) < BLIM), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(noise_n = as.numeric(noise))

gs <- ggplot(sm, aes(noise_n, fsmall, colour = algo_f, group = algo_f)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = .5) + geom_point(size = 1.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ param, labeller = label_parsed) +
  scale_x_log10(breaks = c(.1, 1, 10)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), breaks = c(0, .25, .5, .75, 1)) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = ALGO_COL, name = NULL) +
  labs(x = "instrument noise",
       y = paste0("fraction with |bias| < ", BLIM, " dex")) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 9, base_family = "Helvetica") +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), legend.position = "top",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 7), axis.text = element_text(size = 7),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 8), strip.text = element_text(size = 8))
gs
ggsave("Figure_5_bias_vs_noise_summary.pdf", gs, width = 6.0, height = 3.4)
```
